testcase.name: test_wealth_brief_with_defaults

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('summary' in {'current_retirement_age': 60, 'current_trajectory': {'gap_to_target': 35.0, 'on_track': False, 'projected_retirement_wealth': 4817031}, 'financial_snapshot': {'annual_income': 180000, 'annual_savings': 27000.0, 'monthly_cashflow': 2250.0, 'net_worth': 1500000, ...}, 'generated_at': '2026-03-16T20:22:56.014097', ...} or 'brief' in {'current_retirement_age': 60, 'current_trajectory': {'gap_to_target': 35.0, 'on_track': False, 'projected_retirement_wealth': 4817031}, 'financial_snapshot': {'annual_income': 180000, 'annual_savings': 27000.0, 'monthly_cashflow': 2250.0, 'net_worth': 1500000, ...}, 'generated_at': '2026-03-16T20:22:56.014097', ...} or 'insights' in {'current_retirement_age': 60, 'current_trajectory': {'gap_to_target': 35.0, 'on_track': False, 'projected_retirement_wealth': 4817031}, 'financial_snapshot': {'annual_income': 180000, 'annual_savings': 27000.0, 'monthly_cashflow': 2250.0, 'net_worth': 1500000, ...}, 'generated_at': '2026-03-16T20:22:56.014097', ...} or 'highlights' in {'current_retirement_age': 60, 'current_trajectory': {'gap_to_target': 35.0, 'on_track': False, 'projected_retirement_wealth': 4817031}, 'financial_snapshot': {'annual_income': 180000, 'annual_savings': 27000.0, 'monthly_cashflow': 2250.0, 'net_worth': 1500000, ...}, 'generated_at': '2026-03-16T20:22:56.014097', ...})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration48_100_percent.py:431: in test_wealth_brief_with_defaults assert "summary" in data or "brief" in data or "insights" in data or "highlights" in data E AssertionError: assert ('summary' in {'current_retirement_age': 60, 'current_trajectory': {'gap_to_target': 35.0, 'on_track': False, 'projected_retirement_wealth': 4817031}, 'financial_snapshot': {'annual_income': 180000, 'annual_savings': 27000.0, 'monthly_cashflow': 2250.0, 'net_worth': 1500000, ...}, 'generated_at': '2026-03-16T20:22:56.014097', ...} or 'brief' in {'current_retirement_age': 60, 'current_trajectory': {'gap_to_target': 35.0, 'on_track': False, 'projected_retirement_wealth': 4817031}, 'financial_snapshot': {'annual_income': 180000, 'annual_savings': 27000.0, 'monthly_cashflow': 2250.0, 'net_worth': 1500000, ...}, 'generated_at': '2026-03-16T20:22:56.014097', ...} or 'insights' in {'current_retirement_age': 60, 'current_trajectory': {'gap_to_target': 35.0, 'on_track': False, 'projected_retirement_wealth': 4817031}, 'financial_snapshot': {'annual_income': 180000, 'annual_savings': 27000.0, 'monthly_cashflow': 2250.0, 'net_worth': 1500000, ...}, 'generated_at': '2026-03-16T20:22:56.014097', ...} or 'highlights' in {'current_retirement_age': 60, 'current_trajectory': {'gap_to_target': 35.0, 'on_track': False, 'projected_retirement_wealth': 4817031}, 'financial_snapshot': {'annual_income': 180000, 'annual_savings': 27000.0, 'monthly_cashflow': 2250.0, 'net_worth': 1500000, ...}, 'generated_at': '2026-03-16T20:22:56.014097', ...})
